resources.string: Come closer. The fever is warm enough for us all.

"The smiling caretaker anointed each captive brow with golden pus, bidding them welcome. Around him, the sick embraced, coughing red into one another's sleeves and laughing through cracked blisters—for no one had to shiver alone anymore. Even the gentle dead carried new arrivals carefully through the marsh. To loving ears, their cries sounded like joy finally finding a home."
